name: Black Forest Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 13x9 inch baking pan. Reserve 1 cup of dry cake mix and swirl pouch; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the remaining cake mix, oil, and 1 egg at low speed until dough forms. Press into the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of the greased pan. Bake for 8 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth and creamy. Add 2 eggs, 1 at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in the reserved 1 cup of cake mix, sugar, sour cream, and whipping cream at low speed. Beat for 3 minutes at medium speed until creamy.
5. Reserve 2 cups of the cheese mixture. Spoon the remaining cheese mixture over the crust. Add the reserved swirl pouch to the reserved cheese mixture; blend well. Spoon the chocolate mixture evenly over the cheesecake.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes until edges are set and center is almost set. Do not overbake. Run a knife around the sides of the pan. Cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
7. Spoon fruit filling evenly over the top of the cheesecake. Refrigerate several hours or overnight before serving. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 48 bars.
